latin: Bilbo Baggins convivium magnum parabat, nam centesimum et undecimum diem natalem celebrabat. omnes Hobbiti Comitatus invitati erant, et cibi et dona ubique erant. sub fine convivii, Bilbo orationem longam habuit et omnes gratias egit. tum subito evanuit ante oculos omnium! Hobbiti valde perturbati erant, sed Bilbo anulum magicum in digito gerebat qui eum invisibilem fecit.

questions.prompt: What happened at the end of Bilbo's speech?

questions.target: He wore a magic ring that made him invisible
choices: A wizard cast a spell on him
He wore a magic ring that made him invisible

translation: Bilbo Baggins was preparing a great feast, for he was celebrating his one hundred and eleventh birthday. All the Hobbits of the Shire were invited, and food and gifts were everywhere. At the end of the feast, Bilbo gave a long speech and thanked everyone. Then suddenly he vanished before the eyes of all! The Hobbits were greatly disturbed, but Bilbo wore a magic ring on his finger that made him invisible.
